allow: Bash(sqlcmd -S localhost -d GESTOREASY -E -Q "SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE' ORDER BY TABLE_NAME" -h -1)

Bash(sqlcmd -S localhost -d GESTOREASY -E -Q "SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT, COLUMNPROPERTY\(OBJECT_ID\(TABLE_SCHEMA+'.'+TABLE_NAME\), COLUMN_NAME, 'IsIdentity'\) AS IS_IDENTITY FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS ORDER BY TABLE_NAME, ORDINAL_POSITION" -h -1 -W)
